Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to be followed by any subsequent activity
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants containing both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Request Payment in successful variants (ending with Payment Handled)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants that include a prior rejection by any role versus variants with no prior rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the next activity, distinguishing between final approval and rejection outcomes
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in cases where the employee had previously resubmitted following a rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants without intermediate rejections
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR compared to the time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'
